steps.t: The crumpled note you found mentioned someone named Garaphir, who Kholnedák thinks can be found in Imloth Melui. She has recommended that you go to Im…
Merenir has suggested that you look for Garaphir in the market district in Imloth Melui.
You managed to find Garaphir in the marketplace, but he fled when you drew near. You should pursue Garaphir through Imloth Melui.
After a brief chase through Imloth Melui, Garaphir has collapsed on a tall stair-case, panting for breath. You should talk to Garaphir.
After collapsing on one of Imloth Melui's incredibly tall set of stairs, Garaphir was more than willing to point the finger at his employer, the noble…
Realizing he was found out, Maengar attacked you to keep his secrets safe. He was no match for you, however, and has been defeated. You should collect…
You should bring the accounts book to Merenir in Imloth Melui.
Merenir mentioned that someone had been looking for you while you were dealing with Maengar. You can find Kholnedák in Imloth Melui.
